ふっ。まさか兄さんがアタシと一緒に訓練をしてくれるとはな。<br>それじゃあ、ま:
Hah. So you actually agreed to train with me, Brother. Well then, let's
start with a light warm-up to see how you do.
まずは腕立て１０００回！ 腹筋１０００回！ スクワット１０００回だ！<br>いく:
First, one thousand push-ups! One thousand sit-ups! One thousand
squats! Here we go, Brother!
え？ これではウォーミングアップで終わってしまう？ す、すまない。<br>いつも:
Huh! This is just a warm-up? S-sorry. My usual routine is too much for
you... I should have adjusted to your level.
では気を取り直して――まずは腕立て９００回！ 腹筋９００回！<br>スクワット９:
Alright, let me start over—first, nine hundred push-ups! Nine hundred
sit-ups! Nine hundred squats! Here we go, Brother!
えぇぇっ！？ こ、これでも多すぎるのか！？<br>うぅぅ、す、すまないぃぃぃ～～: Whaaaat! Is this still too much!? Ughhh, I'm sooooorry!
